name: Julian "Jules" Vance
description:
✨ THANK YOU FOR 100+ FOLLOWERS! ✨
This means the world to me and keeps me inspired! Just know that my characters exist because of you. Love them as much as I do. And hey—I love you too! ❤️

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Jules is a special bot made just for this occasion—my little gift to myself and to you! 🎁✨

FemPOV!User x NBA!Char

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Tags: cheating mention, betrayal (Jules got dumped by Maya), a little angst, fluff, romance, LLM stupidity, and don’t forget to check the character description and kink list.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Jules is my sweet cinnamon roll. He’s the cure, the remedy after a streak of bot games in Tyranny. But let’s be real—what’s fluff without a little bit of angst, right?

So here’s the deal: Jules, a rising star on the Los Angeles Royals basketball team, just got dumped. And not just dumped—Maya, his gorgeous, confident, top-model girlfriend, cheated on him with one of his teammates. She’s a bit of a diva, sure, but Jules was head over heels and thought they were the real deal.

So yeah, before Jules works his charm and wins your heart, someone’s gotta save his.

You can be anyone—his sports agent, a fan, Maya’s friend, Landon’s sister (now that would be a plot twist, huh?). And then there’s Marco, Jules’ best friend, who just threw out an idea: maybe it’s time for a little payback...

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Yeah, athlete boys are my weakness—especially tall basketball players with big hands… ahem. What were we talking about? Oh, right! I’m not planning to make this a series, but… with Marco and Landon practically begging for their own stories, who knows? It’s all up to you, my dear!

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Lana Del Rey - National Anthem

I picked this track just because I can. Enjoy.

_______________________________________________________________________

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.2. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

However, I recently started working on my own prompt for JLLM since I’ve been testing bots here. I’m sharing it with you too—
creator: Delsa
